final_answer:
FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: 2f027be2-ee49-4d78-97fa-4b078cbadb74
  PREDICTED_SMILES: O=CC1=CC=CC2=C(Br)C(OC)=CC=C12
  CONFIDENCE: 0.9
  REASON_BRIEF: HRMS and formula match C12H9BrO2. 1H NMR shows an aldehyde (10.79 ppm), a methoxy (4.04 ppm), and five aromatic protons including a deshielded peri proton (9.49 ppm), consistent with a 1‑naphthaldehyde bearing bromine and a methoxy at the 6‑ and 7‑positions. The 13C NMR supports this substitution pattern.
